languages.text: {n}Вид-скрин стража едва заметно мигает.{/n} "Ошибка. Запрос нерелевантен. Вход санкционирован только для Себериана фон Валанциуса или его прямых потомков".
{n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

languages.text: {n}La pantalla del guardián parpadea momentáneamente.{/n} «Error. Solicitud no válida. Solo se permite la entrada a Seberian von Valancius o a sus descendientes directos».
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}La pantalla del guardián parpadea momentáneamente.{/n} «Error. Solicitud no válida. Solo se permite la entrada a Seberian von Valancius o a sus descendientes directos».

languages.text: {n}守卫的视讯屏幕微微闪了一下。{/n}“错误。请求无效。仅授权塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯或其直系后代进入。”
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}守卫的视讯屏幕微微闪了一下。{/n}“错误。请求无效。仅授权塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯或其直系后代进入。”

languages.text: {n}L'écran du gardien clignote légèrement.{/n} « Erreur. Requête non valide. Accès réservé à Seberian von Valancius et à ses descendants directs. »
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'écran du gardien clignote légèrement.{/n} « Erreur. Requête non valide. Accès réservé à Seberian von Valancius et à ses descendants directs. »

languages.text: {n}Muhafızın video ekranı hafifçe titriyor.{/n} "Hata. Talep geçersiz. Giriş sadece Seberian von Valancius veya doğrudan soyundan gelenler için yetkilendirilmiştir."
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhafızın video ekranı hafifçe titriyor.{/n} "Hata. Talep geçersiz. Giriş sadece Seberian von Valancius veya doğrudan soyundan gelenler için yetkilendirilmiştir."

languages.text: {n}守護者のビデオ画面がわずかにちらつく。{/n}「エラー。要求は無効です。シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス本人またはその直系子孫のみが許可されています。」
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."

traits.locale_text: {n}守護者のビデオ画面がわずかにちらつく。{/n}「エラー。要求は無効です。シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス本人またはその直系子孫のみが許可されています。」

languages.text: {n}Der Vid-Bildschirm flackert nur leicht.{/n} "Fehler. Die Anfrage ist ungültig. Lediglich Seberian von Valancius und seine direkten Nachkommen dürfen eintreten."
languages.original_text: {n}The guardian's vid-screen flickers just slightly.{/n} "Error. The request is invalid. Entry is authorised only for Seberian von Valancius or his direct descendants."
